However, responsible data sharing requires the detection and removal of personally identifiable and sensitive information to protect individual privacy. To support the development and evaluation of automatic de-identification systems, we present DialogPII, a multilingual dataset of synthetic dialogs and speech-derived transcripts for personal information detection. DialogPII covers eight interaction scenarios (emergency calls, medical anamnesis interviews, therapy sessions, insurance communication, customer support, clinical interviews regarding an AI-supported dashboard, police reports, and group therapy discussions), 19 entity types, and 11 languages (English, Arabic, Finnish, French, German, Hindi, Italian, Polish, Portuguese, Spanish, and Turkish). Dialogs were generated semi-automatically using large language models, manually curated for plausibility and diversity, and localized to country- and city-specific contexts. All dialogs were additionally converted to speech via text-to-speech synthesis, transcribed with Whisper, and annotated through automatic projection and manual correction, yielding aligned written and speech-derived resources across all languages. We further release baseline multilingual named entity recognition models and provide technical validation through inter-annotator agreement analysis, translation quality evaluation, annotation projection assessment, and benchmark experiments with transformer-based sequence labeling models.

</details>


### [368] [REAR: Test-time Preference Realignment through Reward Decomposition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30339)
*Fuxiang Zhang,Pengcheng Wang,Chenran Li,Yi-Chen Li,Yuxin Chen,Lang Feng,Chenfeng Xu,Masayoshi Tomizuka,Bo An*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出REAR框架，通过将奖励函数分解为问题相关和偏好相关两部分，并利用token级策略对数概率的线性组合来实现高效计算，从而将测试时扩展（TTS）从可验证领域推广到偏好对齐任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有后训练方法虽能对齐LLM与用户偏好，但需要昂贵的数据整理和额外训练；而测试时扩展（TTS）虽高效且无需训练，但主要局限于数学、编程等可验证领域。作者希望将TTS推广到更广泛的偏好对齐任务中。

Method: 将偏好对齐重新建模为"重新对齐"问题，把底层奖励函数分解为问题相关和偏好信息相关两部分，推导出REAR（重新对齐奖励），以选择性地重新调整这两部分奖励的比例。REAR可表示为token级策略对数概率的线性组合，易于与best-of-N采样、树搜索等TTS算法集成。

Result: REAR不仅在多种用户需求下的偏好对齐任务中实现了可扩展的测试时重新对齐，还能在适当的偏好设置下泛化到数学和视觉任务。

Conclusion: REAR框架成功将测试时扩展从可验证领域推广到偏好对齐领域，为高效、无需额外训练的LLM对齐提供了新路径，并展现出跨任务泛化能力。

Abstract: Aligning large language models (LLMs) with diverse user preferences is a critical yet challenging task. While post-training methods can adapt models to specific needs, they often require costly data curation and additional training. Test-time scaling (TTS) presents an efficient, training-free alternative, but its application has been largely limited to verifiable domains like mathematics and coding, where response correctness is easily judged. To extend TTS to preference alignment, we introduce a novel framework that models the task as a realignment problem, since the base model often fails to sufficiently align with the stated preference. Our key insight is to decompose the underlying reward function into two components: one related to the question and the other to preference information. This allows us to derive a REAlignment Reward (REAR) that selectively rescales the proportions of these two reward terms. We then show that REAR can be formulated as a linear combination of token-level policy log-probabilities, making it computationally efficient and easy to integrate with various TTS algorithms such as best-of-$N$ sampling and tree search. Experiments show that compared to other test-time baselines, REAR not only enables scalable test-time realignment for preference alignment tasks under diverse user requirements, but also generalizes to mathematical and visual tasks under appropriate preference settings.

</details>


### [369] [OLIVE: View-Augmented Latent Prediction with Waveform Reconstruction for Speech SSL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30356)
*Karl El Hajal,Mathew Magimai. -Doss*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: OLIVE是一个联合优化分析和合成目标的自监督语音表征学习框架，通过将视图增强的掩码潜在预测与波形重建结合，在统一目标下提升生成、说话人任务性能，并保持识别和语义任务的竞争力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自监督语音表征学习方法通常只关注分析目标（如掩码预测），忽略了信号级信息的保留，导致在生成任务和说话人相关任务上表现不佳。作者希望设计一个同时优化分析和合成目标的方法，使表征既能支持高层的语义/识别任务，也能保留底层信号信息以支持生成任务。

Method: OLIVE框架包含两个核心目标：(1) 视图增强的掩码潜在预测（分析目标），通过学习不变性表征来提升下游任务鲁棒性；(2) 波形重建（合成目标），约束早期编码器特征保留信号级信息。两者在统一目标下联合优化。

Result: OLIVE在生成任务和说话人任务上取得了改进；在识别和语义任务上保持了竞争力；同时提升了波形重建质量。

Conclusion: 联合优化分析和合成目标是有效的自监督语音表征学习策略，能够兼顾底层信号信息和上层语义不变性，支持更广泛的下游任务。

Abstract: We propose Online Latent prediction with Invariant Views and rEconstruction (OLIVE), a self-supervised speech representation learning framework that jointly optimizes analysis and synthesis objectives. OLIVE combines view-augmented masked latent prediction with waveform reconstruction under a unified objective. Reconstruction constrains early encoder features to retain signal-level information, while masked latent prediction shapes later contextual representations toward invariance for robust downstream performance. We show that these objectives enable representations that support a broad range of tasks. In particular, OLIVE improves results on generation and speaker tasks, maintains competitive performance on recognition and semantic tasks, and improves waveform reconstruction.

</details>


### [370] [MOPD: Multi-Teacher On-Policy Distillation for Capability Integration in LLM Post-Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30406)
*Wenhan Ma,Jianyu Wei,Liang Zhao,Hailin Zhang,Bangjun Xiao,Lei Li,Qibin Yang,Bofei Gao,Yudong Wang,Rang Li,Jinhao Dong,Zhifang Sui,Fuli Luo*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出多教师在线蒸馏(MOPD)范式，通过先训练领域专家模型再在线蒸馏到学生模型，实现多能力高效整合，在Qwen3-30B-A3B和工业级模型MiMo-V2-Flash上取得优于现有方法的效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM后训练中整合多种能力存在困难，Off-Policy Finetune效率低，Mix-RL性能损失，需要一种高效且能保持性能的多能力整合方法。

Method: MOPD分两阶段：(1)对各领域分别进行RL训练获得领域教师；(2)在学生模型自身rollout数据上对这些教师进行在线蒸馏，消除暴露偏差并提供密集优化信号。

Result: 在Qwen3-30B-A3B上，MOPD超越Mix-RL、Cascade RL、Off-Policy Finetune、Param-Merge等基线，几乎继承了每位教师的全部能力。已部署于工业级模型MiMo-V2-Flash的后训练中。

Conclusion: MOPD是一种高效的多能力整合范式，支持领域教师并行独立开发，消除了跨领域耦合，具备实际工业应用价值。

Abstract: Modern large language models (LLMs) rely on reinforcement learning during post-training to push specific capabilities, yet integrating multiple capabilities into one model remains hard. Existing methods, such as Off-Policy Finetune and Mix-RL, are either inefficient or lose performance. In this work, we propose Multi-teacher On-Policy Distillation (MOPD), a post-training paradigm for combining the capabilities of multiple domain RL teachers: we first run per-domain specialised RL to obtain a set of domain teachers, then distill these teachers into the student on its own rollouts. This eliminates exposure bias and provides a dense optimization signal. On Qwen3-30B-A3B, MOPD outperforms Mix-RL, Cascade RL, Off-Policy Finetune, and Param-Merge baselines, inheriting nearly all of each teacher's capability. MOPD also enables parallel, independent development of domain teachers, removing the cross-domain coupling typical of multi-domain post-training. MOPD has been deployed in the post-training of MiMo-V2-Flash, an industrial-scale frontier model, demonstrating its practical value for capability integration in frontier-scale LLMs.

</details>


### [371] [Field Order Should Not Matter: Permutation-Invariant Embedding Model Fine-Tuning for Structured Metadata Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30473)
*Aivin V. Solatorio,Olivier Dupriez,Rafael Macalaba*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出排列不变微调(PI-FT)，通过随机字段顺序和随机字段丢弃来序列化结构化元数据记录，解决了标准微调中字段顺序变化导致检索质量大幅下降的问题，在DevDataBench基准上使用118M参数模型取得了超越text-embedding-3-large的效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准微调将结构化元数据序列化为字符串时，模型会利用绝对位置信息而非字段标签进行检索，导致索引重建时字段顺序变化使检索性能大幅下降（7.4 nDCG@10）。同时，现有方法缺乏针对多语言、细粒度结构化元数据检索的基准。

Method: 提出PI-FT：对每条记录在每次训练时随机采样字段顺序并进行随机字段丢弃（约两行代码改动），强制模型关注字段标签而非位置信息。同时构建DevDataBench基准，使用LLM生成15种语言的细粒度查询。

Result: PI-FT将顺序变化带来的性能损失从7.4 nDCG@10降至0.2，且分布内性能几乎无损。118M参数的CPU编码器在DevDataBench上达到0.707 nDCG@10，超越text-embedding-3-large的0.556，在低资源语言上增益最大。

Conclusion: 结构化元数据检索中，字段顺序是影响检索质量的关键因素而非实现细节。PI-FT是一种轻量高效的解决方案，使小模型在面向AI助手和智能体的数据检索场景中表现优异。已开源基准、管道、模型和PI-FT框架。

Abstract: We study retrieval over catalogs of structured metadata, where each record is a small schema whose fields answer different kinds of query. Embedding a record with a text encoder first serializes its fields into a string, which forces a choice of field order. We show this choice, usually treated as an implementation detail, silently controls retrieval quality once the encoder is fine-tuned. A standard fine-tune loses 7.4 nDCG@10 points when the index is rebuilt under a different field order, because it reads absolute position instead of the field labels. We propose permutation-invariant fine-tuning ($\textbf{PI-FT}$), which serializes each record under a freshly sampled field order with random field dropout, so meaning binds to the labels rather than to position. The change is about two lines in the data loader; it costs negligible in-distribution accuracy and cuts the order-change penalty to 0.2 points. We study this in the discovery of development statistics, a catalog of nearly 10,000 indicators that should be searchable in many languages by a model small enough to self-host. As AI assistants and agents increasingly mediate access to public data and statistics, this retrieval step decides whether an answer is grounded in the right indicator or series, making discoverability a precondition for disseminating data through AI. Because usage logs cannot provide training signal for indicators no one has searched, we generate the queries instead. $\textbf{DevDataBench}$ is a fully LLM-generated benchmark of grounded, facet-targeted queries across 15 languages, covering every indicator for both training and evaluation. A fine-tuned 118M-parameter CPU encoder outperforms every zero-shot baseline, including $\texttt{text-embedding-3-large}$ (0.707 vs.\ 0.556 nDCG@10), with the largest gains in low-resource languages. We release the benchmark, pipeline, models, and a reusable PI-FT framework.

</details>


### [372] [SIMAX: A Scalable and Interpretable Framework for Multi-Fidelity and Annotated Clinician-Patient Dialogue Simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30491)
*Zhuhan Bao,Rui Yang,Bohao Yang,Zhiyi Liu,Sicheng Shu,Ruio Heerschap,Le Li,Doris Yang,Elisabeth Bond,Haoyuan Wang,Nicoleta Economou-Zavlanos,Joshua M. Biro,Matthew McDermott,Nan Liu,Anand Chowdhury,Kai Sun,Kathryn Pollak,Ed Hammond,Chuan Hong*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出SIMAX框架，可生成带有参考行为标注的可控临床对话数据，用于开发和验证医患沟通编码系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人工编码临床沟通数据成本高、不一致且难以规模化，需要AI驱动的编码系统，但缺乏带标注的真实对话数据用于评估。

Method: SIMAX框架：基于预定义的临床场景、角色人设、语音条件和目标沟通行为，通过Global Codebook（整体质量）和WISER Codebook（可计数行为）控制行为，生成合成对话。

Result: 生成3,388个对话，覆盖3个专科；自动评估显示语音自然度合理、转录保真度高、文本-音频对应良好；人工评估中位数MOS 4.67，临床真实感中位数3.00；下游评估显示可检测编码系统对不同行为目标的敏感性不足。

Conclusion: SIMAX可生成可控、可复现的模拟医患对话，为沟通编码系统的开发、验证和优化提供数据基础。

Abstract: Background. The widespread deployment of ambient digital scribes is driving large-scale capture of clinician-patient dialogues. Human coding of clinical communication data remains costly, inconsistent, and difficult to scale, motivating AI-driven communication coding systems. However, evaluating these systems requires real-world dialogues and human-coded labels, both hard to obtain at scale.
  Methods. We developed SIMAX (Scalable and Interpretable Framework for Multi-Fidelity and Annotated Clinician-Patient Dialogue Simulation), a framework for generating controlled clinical dialogue data with reference behavioral annotations. SIMAX generates clinician-patient dialogues from predefined clinical scenarios, personas and voice conditions, and target communication behaviors. Behaviors are controlled using two codebooks: the Global Codebook for overall communication quality and the WISER Codebook for specific countable behaviors. We evaluated SIMAX using automated and human quality assessments and an example communication coding system.
  Results. SIMAX generated 3,388 simulated dialogues across three specialties, multiple visit stages, persona characteristics, and accent conditions. Automated assessment showed mean UTMOS and WV-MOS scores of 3.03 and 2.61, WER and CER of 0.07 and 0.05, and CLAP cosine similarity of 0.41, suggesting reasonable speech naturalness, high transcription fidelity, and positive text-audio correspondence. Human evaluation showed a median MOS of 4.67 and a median clinical realism score of 3.00. Downstream evaluation suggests that SIMAX can assess how a communication coding system responds to behavioral targets and reveal insufficient sensitivity in some dimensions.
  Conclusions. SIMAX generates controlled and reproducible simulated clinician-patient dialogues, providing a data foundation for developing, validating, and refining communication coding systems.

</details>


### [373] [Regime-Aware Peer Specialization for Robust RAG under Heterogeneous Knowledge Conflicts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30518)
*Bo Wang,Heyan Huang,Yaolin Li,Yanghao Zhou,Jiahao Teng,Ziyi Yang,Ge Shi,Chong Feng*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出RAPS-DA，一个面向检索增强生成中上下文与模型知识冲突的领域感知专家框架，通过样本级的三重冲突划分（基础、仲裁、抵抗）和词元级的双重选择器，在固定模型规模下实现专业化训练，无需更强教师模型或部署时的领域标签。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RAG系统中检索到的上下文可能与模型参数化知识存在冲突，这些冲突涵盖从可靠证据到对抗性上下文的可靠性谱系。现有方法通常使用领域无关的监督，会混合不同可靠性区间的不可兼容学习信号，导致效果不佳。

Method: 提出RAPS-DA框架：(1) 样本级：将冲突分为三种类型（Grounding、Arbitration、Resistance），每种类型训练一个同等规模的专家，并对样本进行硬路由到匹配的专家进行On-policy反向KL监督；(2) 词元级：双层面选择器利用教师间分歧、师生差异和学生熵，过滤无信息或不稳定的词元，加权高冲突词元，随学生成熟逐步聚焦监督。

Result: 在五个冲突场景和两个分布外基准测试中，RAPS-DA超越了所有提示、解码、微调、强化学习和单教师基线方法。

Conclusion: 性能提升源于固定模型规模下的专业化，而非更强的教师；专家仅在训练时存在，部署时无需领域标签或专家访问。

Abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) improves language models by grounding generation in external context. However, it can be fragile when the retrieved context conflicts with the model's parametric knowledge. Such conflicts span a reliability spectrum, ranging from reliable and partially reliable evidence to adversarial context. Existing remedies often handle such heterogeneous conflicts with regime-agnostic supervision, which can conflate incompatible learning signals across reliability regimes. To disentangle these signals, we propose RAPS-DA, a regime-aware peer specialization framework that addresses conflict at two complementary granularities. At the sample level, conflicts are divided into three regimes, including Grounding, Arbitration, and Resistance, with one same-scale peer specialist trained per regime from a shared base model. Each sample is then hard-routed to its regime-matched peer for on-policy reverse-KL supervision. At the token level, a dual-layer selector uses inter-teacher disagreement, student-teacher divergence, and student entropy to filter uninformative or unstable tokens, upweight confidently misaligned ones, and gradually focus supervision on high-conflict tokens as the student matures. Gains stem from specialization at a fixed model scale, not from a stronger teacher, and the peer specialists exist only during training, so the deployed student requires no regime labels or peer access. Experiments on five conflict scenarios and two out-of-distribution benchmarks show RAPS-DA surpasses all prompting, decoding, fine-tuning, RL, and single-teacher baselines.

</details>


### [374] [TRACE: Temporal Relationship-Aware Conversational Entrainment Detection in Dyadic Speech](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30543)
*Sathvik Manikantan Napa Ugandhar,Hao Zhang,Alison Gunzler,Yuzhe Wang,Thomas Thebaud,Georgi Tinchev,Venkatesh Ravichandran,Laureano Moro-Velázquez*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了DyadEE数据集（用于双人语音交互中的情感韵律检测）和TRACE框架（基于窗口级情感微调Whisper嵌入的交互轨迹建模），实验表明融合对话上下文和人际关系信息可提升检测效果，最高准确率达97.01%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着语音AI智能体的普及，理解对话交互中的情感韵律（emotional entrainment）变得越来越重要。情感韵律受社会关系和对话语境影响，但目前缺乏专门用于检测双人对话中情感韵律的数据集和方法。

Method: 提出了DyadEE数据集（包含真实情感韵律对话和通过伙伴交换与情感重合成破坏韵律的合成交互），以及TRACE框架（将双人交互建模为从情感微调Whisper表示中提取的有序声学嵌入序列，每个样本被视为交互轨迹而非聚合话语）。

Result: 在DyadEE数据集上，融合对话上下文和关系信息可改善情感韵律检测，TRACE框架达到最佳准确率97.01%。

Conclusion: 对话上下文和人际关系信息对情感韵律检测有显著提升作用，TRACE框架在双人情感韵律检测任务上表现优异。

Abstract: With the proliferation of speech AI agents, understanding emotional entrainment in conversational interaction has become increasingly important. Emotional entrainment is shaped by social relationships and conversational context, influencing affective coordination over time. We introduce DyadEE, a dataset for emotional entrainment detection in dyadic speech interactions, containing both emotionally entrained conversations and synthetic interactions where entrainment is disrupted through partner swapping and emotion resynthesis. We further propose TRACE, a window-level framework that models dyadic interaction as ordered sequences of acoustic embeddings derived from emotion fine-tuned Whisper representations, treating each sample as an interaction trace rather than pooled utterances. Experimental results on DyadEE show that incorporating conversational context and relationship information improves emotional entrainment detection, with TRACE achieving the best accuracy of 97.01%.

</details>


### [375] [Poller: Are LLMs Suitable for Evaluating the Poetry Understanding Task?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30556)
*Shanshan Wang,Derek F. Wong,Jingming Yao,Lidia S. Chao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出Poller方法，利用大语言模型模拟诗人角色来评估中国古诗理解，在多个维度上显著降低了与人类评估的误差，尤其在修辞技巧和陌生化维度分别达到94.55%和89.53%的错误率降低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统自动评估方法不适用于现代中国诗歌，人类评估虽可靠但成本高且无法规模化，因此需要一种兼顾自动化效率与人类专业水平的诗歌评估方法。

Method: 提出Poller（Poetry LLM Evaluator）方法，让LLM扮演诗歌作者角色并注入详细信息，从诗人视角模拟人类评估与判断，在八个专业维度上进行诗歌理解评估。

Result: 实验表明Poller有效降低了LLM与人类之间的评估误差，在修辞技巧维度达到94.55%错误率降低，在陌生化维度达到89.53%错误率降低，这些效果是传统LLM评估方法无法实现的。

Conclusion: Poller方法弥合了自动化效率与人类专业知识之间的鸿沟，为诗歌相关任务的自动评估奠定了基础。

Abstract: Traditional automatic evaluation methods have been shown to be unsuitable for modern Chinese poetry because of the distinct nature of this literary genre. Human evaluation remains reliable, but is expensive and not applicable to large-scale data. In this paper, we propose Poller (Poetry LLM Evaluator), a novel method leveraging large language models (LLMs) to evaluate the poetry understanding task. Specifically, our method requires LLMs to play the role of a poem's author with detailed information, thereby emulating human evaluation and judgment by adopting the poet's perspective. We conducted comprehensive experiments on multiple LLMs, evaluating the interpretations of poems across eight specialized dimensions. Experimental results demonstrate that our method effectively reduces the evaluation error between LLMs and humans. Especially for specific dimension evaluation, Poller-based LLMs achieve a 94.55% and 89.53% error reduction for rhetorical techniques and defamiliarization, respectively, compared to baseline methods. These performances are unattainable by conventional LLM evaluation methods. Experimental results from multiple LLMs across various dimensions validate the efficacy of our method. This work bridges the gap between automated efficiency and human expertise, establishing a foundation for automated evaluation in poetry-related tasks.

</details>


### [376] [Morphing into Hybrid Attention Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30562)
*Disen Lan,Jianbin Zheng,Yuxi Ren,Xin Xia,Xuanda Wang,Xuefeng Xiao,Xipeng Qiu,Yu Cheng*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出FlashMorph方法，通过将混合注意力层选择建模为预算约束的子集优化问题，利用可学习的门控机制和线性化正则化，在合成数据上高效选择哪些层保留全注意力，从而将Transformer模型转换为更高效的混合注意力模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的混合注意力模型在层选择上依赖启发式策略（如固定位置模式或逐层评分），将层的重要性视为孤立的，忽视了全局混合配置下各层之间的相互依赖效应。

Method: 1) 将混合层选择建模为预算约束的子集优化问题；2) 构建可变形模型，为每个全注意力层配备转换后的线性注意力分支；3) 冻结模型权重，在合成长上下文检索数据上联合优化逐层门控，并加入线性化正则化；4) 在预设全注意力预算下将学习的门控离散化，实例化混合架构；5) 进行logits蒸馏和长上下文微调。

Result: FlashMorph发现了更有效的混合配置，保持了强大的长上下文召回率和通用基准性能，同时与现有方法相比显著降低了层选择成本。

Conclusion: FlashMorph是一种有效、高效且可扩展的混合注意力层选择方法，能够考虑层间的全局依赖关系，优于现有启发式方法。

Abstract: Hybrid attention models improve long-context efficiency by retaining only a subset of full-attention layers and replacing the remaining layers with linear attention. However, the effectiveness of Transformer-to-hybrid conversion critically depends on which layers preserve full attention. Existing hybrid layer selection methods typically rely on heuristic strategies such as fixed placement patterns or layerwise scoring, implicitly treating layer importance as isolated and overlooking the interdependent layer effect under a global hybrid configuration. In this work, we formulate hybrid layer selection as a budget-constrained subset optimization problem. We further propose FlashMorph (Fast LAyer Selection for Hybrid MORPHing), an effective, efficient and scalable layer selection method for Transformer-to-hybrid conversion. FlashMorph first constructs a morphable model by equipping each full-attention layer with a converted linear-attention branch. It then freezes all model weights and jointly optimizes layerwise gates on synthetic long-context retrieval data, with a linearization regularization that encourages the model to rely on linear attention for efficiency. The learned gates are discretized under a preset full-attention budget to instantiate the hybrid architecture, followed by standard logits distillation and long-context finetuning. Extensive experiments show that FlashMorph discovers more effective hybrid configurations, preserves strong long-context recall and general benchmark performance while substantially reducing layer selection cost compared with existing layer selection methods, demonstrating its effectiveness, efficiency, and scalability.

</details>


### [377] [Uncertainty-Aware Generation and Decision-Making Under Ambiguity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30578)
*Nico Daheim,Iryna Gurevych*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出并评估了基于贝叶斯决策理论和风险规避决策的不确定性感知算法，应用于辅导和自动同行评审任务，发现贝叶斯方法优于风险规避方法，但在高模糊性场景下需谨慎实施。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在复杂真实任务中广泛应用，但这些任务具有主观性和对可信输出的需求，而决策算法受到的关注不足。

Method: 基于贝叶斯决策理论和风险规避决策，结合共形预测（conformal prediction）对策略和评分提供保证，应用于辅导和自动同行评审任务。

Result: 不确定性感知算法能提升生成的效用，但风险规避规则可能因优化通用输出而降低性能，贝叶斯方法表现更优。

Conclusion: 利用决策理论改进了LLM决策，并指出了开放挑战。

Abstract: With rapidly improving capabilities, Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used in many complex real-world tasks. Beyond requiring in-depth knowledge and reasoning skills, many of these tasks exhibit a high degree of subjectivity and require that the outputs of the model can be trusted. While a lot of progress has been made to train better models, decision-making algorithms have received less attention. In this work, we present and evaluate various uncertainty-aware decision-making algorithms based on Bayesian decision theory and risk-averse decision making on the tasks of tutoring and automatic peer reviewing. Concretely, we take uncertainty over tutoring strategies and review scores into account when generating a tutor response or review and use conformal prediction to provide guarantees over strategy and score. We find empirically that these algorithms can improve the utility of the generations but need to be carefully implemented when ambiguity is high. For example, risk-averse rules can degrade performance by optimizing for generic outputs, while Bayesian methods tend to perform better. Our work uses techniques from decision theory to improve LLM-based decision-making and outlines open challenges for the community.

</details>


### [378] [Scaling the Horizon, Not the Parameters: Reaching Trillion-Parameter Performance with a 35B Agent](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30616)
*Lei Bai,Zongsheng Cao,Yang Chen,Zhiyao Cui,Shangheng Du,Yue Fan,Shiyang Feng,Zijie Guo,Haonan He,Liang He,Xiaohan He,Shuyue Hu,Yusong Hu,Songtao Huang,Yichen Jiang,Hao Li,Xin Li,Dahua Lin,Weihao Lin,Fenghua Ling,Dongrui Liu,Zhuo Liu,Runmin Ma,Chunjiang Mu,Haoyang Peng,Tianshuo Peng,Jinxin Shi,Luohe Shi,Boyuan Sun,Zelin Tan,Shengji Tang,Qianyi Wang,Yiming Wu,Yi Xie,Xiangchao Yan,Jingqi Ye,Peng Ye,Fangchen Yu,Jiakang Yuan,Bihao Zhan,Bo Zhang,Chen Zhang,Shufei Zhang,Shuaiyu Zhang,Wenlong Zhang,Yiqun Zhang,Junpeng Zhao,Zhijie Zhong,Bowen Zhou,Yuhao Zhou*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出Agents-A1，一个35B混合专家（MoE）智能体模型，通过扩展智能体任务视界（agent horizon）达到万亿参数级模型性能。该模型基于长视界知识-动作基础设施（平均轨迹45K tokens），采用三阶段训练：全领域SFT、域级教师模型、多教师域路由在线蒸馏，在多个长视界基准上超越或媲美Kimi-K2.6和DeepSeek-V4-pro等万亿参数模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索智能体视界扩展（agent-horizon scaling）的两种路径：扩展长视界轨迹与扩展异构智能体能力，旨在用更小模型达到大模型在长视界任务上的性能。

Method: 1）构建长视界知识-动作基础设施（连接外部知识、动作、观察、验证器结果，平均轨迹45K tokens）；2）三阶段训练：全领域SFT、域级教师模型、多教师域路由在线蒸馏+显著词汇对齐，统一六个异构领域。

Result: Agents-A1在SEAL-0 (56.4)、IFBench (80.6)、HiPhO (46.4)、FrontierScience-Olympiad (79.0)、MolBench-Bind (56.8)上领先Kimi-K2.6和DeepSeek-V4-pro，在SciCode (44.3)、HLE (47.6)、BrowseComp (75.5)上具有竞争力。

Conclusion: 35B的Agents-A1通过视界扩展可媲美万亿参数模型在长视界任务上的性能，为社区提供了一条实用的模型缩放路径。

Abstract: We introduce Agents-A1, a 35B Mixture-of-Experts Agentic Model that reaches trillion-parameter-level performance by scaling the agent horizon. We investigate agent-horizon scaling from two perspectives: scaling long-horizon trajectories and scaling heterogeneous agent abilities. To support this goal, we build a long-horizon knowledge-action infrastructure that connects external knowledge, actions, observations, and verifier outcomes, producing agentic trajectories with an average length of 45K tokens. Based on this, we train Agents-A1 with a three-stage recipe. First, we perform full-domain supervised fine-tuning to align the base model with broad agentic behaviors. Second, we train domain-level teacher models to capture specialized expertise in each domain. Third, we propose a multi-teacher domain-routed on-policy distillation with salient vocabulary alignment to improve knowledge transfer efficiency across different domains, unifying six heterogeneous domains into one deployable student model. Agents-A1 achieves strong and broad performance for long-horizon agent benchmarks. Compared with 1T-parameter model such as Kimi-K2.6 and DeepSeek-V4-pro, Agents-A1 achieves leading results on SEAL-0 (56.4), IFBench (80.6), HiPhO (46.4), FrontierScience-Olympiad (79.0), and MolBench-Bind (56.8), and remains highly competitive on SciCode (44.3), HLE (47.6) and BrowseComp (75.5). We hope this work provides the community with a practical path for scaling the horizon using a 35B agent that can reach or match the performance of 1T models on long-horizon tasks.

</details>


<div id='cs.NI'></div>

# cs.NI [[Back]](#toc)

### [379] [Multi-Agent DRL for QoS and Energy Optimization in RIS-Enabled Open-RAN Industrial 6G TN/NTN Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28339)
*Marwan Dhuheir,Thang X. Vu,Symeon Chatzinotas*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于RIS（可重构智能超表面）和Open-RAN的天地一体化工业6G网络框架，利用无人机搭载RIS配合地面单元和高空平台，通过多智能体深度强化学习（Dec-POMDP）联合优化速率、时延和能耗，相比基线方法在速率上提升75%、时延降低25%、能耗节省16%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统地面网络在动态、易阻塞的工业环境中难以提供稳定覆盖，而现有优化方法因高维度和强耦合变得计算上难以处理，因此需要设计一种新的框架来满足工业6G对超可靠、低时延和能效连接的需求。

Method: 提出RIS-enabled Open-RAN框架，集成地面（TN）和非地面（NTN）网络，无人机搭载RIS、地面无线电单元和高空平台（HAP）协作；将速率、时延和能耗的联合优化问题建模为去中心化部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（Dec-POMDP），并使用多智能体深度强化学习求解。

Result: 与最先进的基于学习的和非RIS的基线方法相比，数据速率提升75%，时延降低25%，能耗节省16%。

Conclusion: RIS辅助的Open-RAN智能架构在工业6G网络中具有显著效果，能有效提升覆盖和性能指标，为天地一体化工业网络提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Industrial 6G networks require ultra-reliable, low-latency, and energy-efficient connectivity in dynamic and blockage-prone environments, where conventional terrestrial deployments often fail to ensure stable coverage. Hence, in this paper, we propose a RIS-enabled Open-RAN framework for integrated terrestrial/non-terrestrial (TN/NTN) industrial 6G networks, in which UAVs-mounted reconfigurable intelligent surfaces (RISs) cooperate with ground radio units and a high-altitude platform (HAP) to enhance connectivity for dense industrial IoT devices. Owing to the high dimensionality and strong coupling among decision variables, conventional optimization techniques become computationally intractable. To overcome this limitation, the joint optimization problem of data rates, latency, and energy consumptions is formulated as a decentralized partially observable Markov decision process (Dec-POMDP) and solved using a multi-agent deep reinforcement learning framework. Simulation results show improvements of up to 75\% in data rate, 25\% latency reduction, and 16\% energy savings compared with state-of-the-art learning-based and non-RIS baselines, demonstrating the effectiveness of RIS-assisted Open-RAN intelligence for industrial 6G networks.

</details>


### [380] [Latency Components in 5G for Edge Application Discovery and Proximity Services: Targets, Measurements, and Practical Working Points](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28341)
*David Rico Menéndez*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文档系统化地调查了5G边缘应用和近端服务部署中的延迟贡献因素，基于标准理论目标和经验测量构建可复现的延迟目录，覆盖用户面（无线接入、传输、核心处理、侧链数据路径）和控制面（DNS、EASDF、NF信令、近端发现、安全建立）组件，并对标准未规定执行时间的控制面功能记录差距并报告范围或代理实例。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文献中5G边缘应用的延迟分析缺乏系统化和可复现性，标准定义了理论目标但实际测量数据分散，控制面功能的执行时间缺乏明确规范。本文旨在填补这一空白，为部署边缘应用和近端服务提供可靠的延迟参考目录。

Method: 不提出新机制，而是基于（i）标准中报告的理论目标和范围，以及（ii）文献中具有代表性的经验测量（或基于这些测量的明确推导），构建可复现的延迟目录。覆盖用户面组件（无线接入、传输、核心遍历、UPF处理、直接侧链数据路径）以及发现和建立贡献（DNS和EASDF行为、基于服务的核心中NF间信令成本、近端发现时序、安全/链路建立）。对于标准定义了程序和API但未规定毫秒级执行时间的控制面功能，记录差距并仅报告具有明确假设的范围或代理实例化。

Result: 提供了一个系统化的延迟目录，涵盖5G边缘应用和近端服务的多个延迟贡献因素，区分了标准定义的明确延迟和尚未标准化的控制面功能延迟差距。

Conclusion: 本文为5G边缘使能应用和近端服务的延迟评估提供了可复现的参考框架，明确指出了控制面功能延迟的标准空白，为未来标准化工作和实际部署决策提供了依据。

Abstract: This technical note surveys latency contributors that matter when deploying edge-enabled applications and proximity services in 5G. Rather than proposing a new mechanism, we focus on building a reproducible latency catalogue grounded on: (i) theoretical targets and ranges reported in standards, and (ii) representative empirical measurements from the literature (or explicit derivations from such measurements). We cover user-plane components (radio access, transport and core traversal, UPF processing, and direct sidelink data paths) as well as discovery and setup contributors (DNS and EASDF behavior, inter-NF signaling costs in the service-based core, proximity discovery timing, and security/link establishment). For several control-plane functions, standards define procedures and APIs but do not fix execution time in milliseconds; in these cases we document the gap and report only ranges or proxy instantiations with clear assumptions.

</details>


### [381] [Operating Regimes of Decentralized Learning Under Mobility and Bandwidth Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28342)
*Samuele Sabella,Chiara Boldrini,Lorenzo Valerio,Marco Conti,Andrea Passarella*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文研究了无线网络环境下（蓝牙LE、LTE、Wi-Fi）的去中心化学习，分析了客户端异步、时变接触图和带宽限制对收敛的影响，识别出三种操作模式：接触间隔决定混合效率、频繁接触可容忍部分更新、过密接触模式导致竞争降低吞吐量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有去中心化学习分析大多基于理想化通信假设（如持续连接、稳定拓扑、无限带宽），不适用于无线移动场景。本文旨在填补这一空白，量化真实无线网络动态对去中心化学习性能的影响。

Method: 提出完全去中心化协议，支持同步与本地训练重叠、部分张量级传输（接触提前结束时）。在Random Waypoint移动模型下，结合蓝牙LE、LTE、Wi-Fi三种无线技术进行仿真实验，分析收敛行为。

Result: 识别出三种操作模式：1）接触间隔主导收敛的混合效率；2）频繁接触下部分更新可被容忍；3）过密接触模式引发竞争，降低有效吞吐量。

Conclusion: 为无线系统下去中心化学习的实际部署提供了理论指导，指出改进连接性、增加带宽或缓解竞争在不同场景下的优先级。

Abstract: Decentralized learning is a promising paradigm for collaborative training in mobile and pervasive systems, as it avoids a central coordinator and does not require sharing raw data. Yet, most analyses rely on idealized communication assumptions that break down in wireless settings, where connectivity is intermittent, topology changes due to mobility, and bandwidth is limited. We study decentralized averaging under client asynchrony, time-varying contact graphs, and technology-dependent throughput constraints. We implement a fully decentralized protocol that overlaps synchronization with local training and supports partial tensor-level transfers when contacts end early. Using Random Waypoint mobility and multiple wireless technologies (Bluetooth LE, LTE, and Wi-Fi), we quantify how network dynamics and link capacity impact convergence. We identify three operating regimes: (i) inter-contact time largely dictates convergence via mixing, (ii) partial updates are often well tolerated when contacts are frequent, and (iii) very dense contact patterns can trigger contention, reducing effective throughput. These findings provide a practical lens to reason about decentralized learning deployments over realistic wireless systems, highlighting when improving connectivity, increasing bandwidth, or mitigating contention is most impactful.

</details>


### [382] [Intent-Driven 6G Service Orchestration: Grounded Translation, Validation, and Decomposition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28348)
*Jean Martins,Leonid Mokrushin,Marin Orlic,Amardeep Kumar A*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 提出一个三层智能体工作流，将6G意图驱动的网络自动化在语义服务目录中落地，通过SHACL验证和跨层分解实现97%的结构化成功率，并减少26%的对抗性幻觉。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于LLM的意图驱动网络方案缺乏生产部署所需的关键能力：无法将意图翻译结果与实际服务目录对齐、缺乏形式化验证机制、也未实现跨层分解。

Method: 构建由三个耦合推理层组成的智能体工作流：(1) 基于TMF兼容的语义服务目录进行意图翻译接地；(2) 使用SHACL对RDF格式的意图进行结构化校验（基于TMF Intent Ontology）；(3) 通过约束满足选择CFSS配置文件，再通过加权集合覆盖选择RFSS配置文件完成跨层分解。

Result: 在6个GPT-4.1/5模型、930个基准测试上，结构化模式成功率97%，自然语言场景平均成功率90%，拒绝不可行请求的正确率100%；将LLM上下文接地到目录能力元数据使对抗性幻觉降低26个百分点，效果优于单纯扩大模型规模。

Conclusion: 将LLM与语义服务目录和形式化验证相结合的智能体工作流，比单纯依赖模型规模扩展更能有效提升意图驱动的6G网络自动化的鲁棒性和可靠性。

Abstract: Intent-based automation for 6G envisions networks steered by high-level goals rather than low-level configurations. Existing LLM-based approaches translate natural language into plausible intent representations but typically omit what production deployment requires: grounding in actual service catalogs, formal validation, and cross-layer decomposition. We address this with an agentic workflow comprising three coupled reasoning layers: (i) grounding the translation in a semantic service catalog that exposes TMF compliant service specifications; (ii) validation of the RDF intent via SHACL structural checking against the TMF Intent Ontology; and (iii) decomposition that selects a CFSS profile via constraint satisfaction over QoS capability envelopes, then covers its infrastructure requirements with RFSS profiles via weighted set cover. Across 930 benchmark runs over six GPT-4.1/5 models, the workflow achieves 97% success in structured mode and 90% on average across natural-language scenarios, with 100% correct rejection of infeasible requests. Grounding LLM context in catalog capability metadata reduces adversarial hallucinations by 26 percentage points; larger gains than scaling model size alone.

</details>


### [383] [CornerCase: Automated Extremal Testing of Protocol Implementations using LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29124)
*Rathin Singha,Kuan Qian,Srinath Saikrishnan,Tracy Zhao,Soheil Abbasloo,Ryan Beckett,Siva Kesava Reddy Kakarla,Todd Millstein,George Varghese*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 提出CornerCase方法，利用LLM从协议规范中提取约束条件，自动生成边界测试用例，在多个协议实现中发现42个异常，其中26个被确认为bug，18个已修复。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 网络协议实现中的bug常出现在规范边界附近（如边界输入、状态依赖的合法消息），现有测试技术（如模糊测试、模型测试）对边界行为的覆盖不足，导致Heartbleed、TCP圣诞节攻击等严重漏洞未被及时发现。

Method: 两阶段测试生成：1）LLM从RFC等协议规范中按章节提取显式合法性约束；2）在每个约束边界处生成极值测试用例，跨多个实现执行差分测试以发现不一致行为。

Result: 在HTTP、DNS、BGP、SMTP、QUIC的广泛使用实现中测试，发现42个异常，26个被确认为bug，18个已修复（如h2o HTTP服务器处理含编码空字节的URL时进入重定向循环）。

Conclusion: CornerCase能有效发现协议实现中的边界缺陷，结合LLM的语义理解能力和差分测试的检测机制，为协议实现安全性测试提供了新的自动化途径。

Abstract: Many software bugs in network protocol implementations arise near specification boundaries, such as inputs just within or outside allowed ranges, or messages that are valid in isolation but invalid in a given state. From the SSL Heartbleed exploit to TCP Christmas Tree packets, boundary inputs have repeatedly exposed critical weaknesses, yet remain under-tested by existing techniques such as fuzzing and model-based testing. We present CornerCase, an automated extremal testing approach that systematically targets such boundary behaviors. Our key idea is to decompose test generation into two stages: first, large language models (LLMs) extract explicit validity constraints from protocol specifications (e.g., RFCs) in a structured, section-by-section manner; second, extremal test cases are generated at or near the boundary of each constraint. These tests are executed across multiple implementations, and differential testing identifies inconsistencies. We evaluate CornerCase on widely used implementations of HTTP, DNS, BGP, SMTP, and QUIC, uncovering many previously unknown bugs. For example, the HTTP server h2o enters a redirect loop when processing URLs containing encoded null bytes. Overall, we used CornerCase to identify and file 42 anomalies; to date 26 have been acknowledged as bugs and 18 fixed, with others under active investigation

</details>


### [384] [Stateless Network-Aware Adaptive Bitrate Streaming over IPFS](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29574)
*Iliya Mirzaei,Shabnam Jafarzade Mojaveri,Amirhossein Najafizadeh*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对IPFS去中心化视频流的无状态网络感知ABR策略，通过仅依赖本地可观测信号和HTTP头携带适应状态，消除跨提供者状态同步，在故障条件下提升QoE最高约6倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的网络感知ABR方案依赖持续同步的消费者-提供者状态，但在IPFS的节点变动、提供者迁移、网络分区等动态环境下，同步状态容易过时，导致策略失效。因此需要探索无需同步状态仍能保持有效的网络感知ABR方案。

Method: 提出无状态的网络感知ABR策略：1) 将传统依赖提供者端状态的适应过程替换为仅使用本地可观测的请求时信号（如延迟、吞吐量）进行码率决策；2) 客户端的适应状态嵌入到HTTP头部中，由客户端控制并透明地跨请求传递，无需提供者端维护状态，从而消除跨提供者状态同步。

Result: 早期实验表明，在故障条件下，该方法能维持高QoE，相比现有方案提升最高约6倍，证明了无状态网络感知适应在去中心化视频交付中的实用性和可扩展性。

Conclusion: 无状态的网络感知ABR方案为IPFS去中心化视频流提供了一种实用且可扩展的基础，通过消除状态同步提升了鲁棒性和部署简易性，同时保持高QoE表现。

Abstract: Modern content delivery is increasingly decentralized, improving availability, cost, and reach for geographically distributed users. The InterPlanetary File System (IPFS) is a promising approach that uses content-based identifiers distributed across a global peer-to-peer network. Although IPFS improves fault tolerance, resilience, and censorship resistance, its unpredictable environment introduces significant performance variability that limits conventional Adaptive Bitrate (ABR) streaming and degrades Quality of Experience (QoE). Recent network-aware ABR solutions address this by incorporating IPFS-specific information into bitrate decisions. However, they rely on maintaining continuously synchronized state across consumers and providers, which can quickly become stale under peer churn, provider migrations, network partitions, and changing content distributions, making existing policies less effective. We investigate whether network-aware ABR can remain effective without synchronized adaptation state, and present a stateless network-aware ABR policy for IPFS-based video streaming. Our approach replaces provider-stateful adaptation with an observation-driven policy that recomputes the bitrate for each segment using only locally observable request-time signals. To preserve adaptation context without provider-side state, the client embeds its adaptation state in HTTP headers, keeping it under client control and carried transparently across requests. By eliminating cross-provider state synchronization, the framework improves robustness to failures and network reconfigurations while simplifying deployment at scale. Early results show the approach maintains high QoE in faulty conditions, improving it by up to roughly 6x over existing solutions. These findings demonstrate that stateless network-aware adaptation provides a practical and scalable foundation for decentralized video delivery.

</details>


### [385] [Cooperative RSU Sleep Scheduling for Green V2I Corridors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29609)
*Yousef AlSaqabi*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于V2I的协作式RSU睡眠调度框架，利用上游RSU通过基础设施间链路共享交通检测信号，实现预测性唤醒。基于真实交通数据评估，该框架相比始终在线模式节省59.5%能耗，同时保持99%延迟合规性，并比独立优化多节省7.7个百分点的能耗。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RSU在非高峰时段持续消耗10-25W功率却服务极少流量，造成严重能源浪费。WAVE服务恢复开销（高达100ms）几乎耗尽3GPP延迟预算，使得独立睡眠决策存在风险，亟需一种协作方案来平衡节能与延迟合规。

Method: 将问题建模为约束马尔可夫决策过程（CMDP），分解为每个RSU的子问题，通过值迭代求解。设计了四种复杂度递增的算法，利用上下游RSU间的基础设施通信链路共享交通检测信号，实现基于空间相关性的预测性唤醒。

Result: 基于科威特城四个连续信号化交叉口的762,050辆车真实数据评估：协作算法降低59.5%能耗，维持99%延迟合规性；在空间相关性ρ≥0.97的下游RSU中，比独立优化多节省7.7个百分点；外推至200个RSU部署场景，年减排CO₂约5.25吨。

Conclusion: 协作式睡眠调度框架能有效利用相邻交叉口的空间相关性，在保证延迟合规的前提下显著降低RSU能耗，为大规模V2I部署提供了可行的节能方案。

Abstract: As vehicle-to-infrastructure (V2I) deployments scale, roadside units (RSUs) that consume 10-25W continuously yet serve negligible traffic during off-peak hours represent a growing source of energy waste. Sleep scheduling can exploit the pronounced diurnal variation in urban traffic, but the WAVE service restoration overhead of up to 100ms nearly exhausts the 3GPPTS~22.185 latency budget, making independent sleep decisions risky. This paper proposes a cooperative framework in which upstream RSUs share traffic detection signals with downstream neighbors via infrastructure-to-infrastructure links, enabling predictive wake-up that exploits spatial correlation between adjacent intersections. The framework is formulated as a constrained Markov decision process and decomposed into per-RSU subproblems solvable by value iteration. Four algorithms of increasing sophistication are evaluated on real hourly traffic data from four consecutive signalized intersections in Kuwait City, comprising a total of 762,050 vehicles over five days. The cooperative algorithm reduces corridor energy consumption by 59.5% relative to always-on operation while maintaining 99% latency compliance, and provides 7.7 percentage points of additional savings over independent per-RSU optimization at downstream RSUs with spatial correlation \r{ho} >= 0.97. Extrapolated to a 200-RSU urban deployment, the cooperative approach yields an estimated 5.25 tonnes of CO2 reduction per year.

</details>


### [386] [Scalable Intention Sharing for ETSI VAMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30034)
*Felipe E. Valle,Oscar Amador,Johan Thunberg,Elena Haller,Alexey Vinel*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文针对密集V2X环境中的机动协调问题，提出基于不确定性椭圆的几何编码方法，相比传统轨迹向量可将计算复杂度降低一个数量级，并通过EKF生成短时预测，在真实自行车GNSS轨迹上验证了多秒预测的可靠性和可扩展性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有ETSI合规方法依赖意图检测和轨迹向量传输，随邻域规模和预测视界增加扩展性差，通信和计算开销大。作者希望从意图共享角度重新审视机动协调，寻找可扩展的几何编码方案。

Method: 比较三种ETSI合规编码（轨迹向量、N-polygon、不确定性椭圆）的复杂度和CPU耗时；使用扩展卡尔曼滤波（EKF）生成短时预测，并将预测结果编码为不确定性椭圆来表示预期机动。

Result: 不确定性椭圆相比轨迹向量降低一个数量级计算复杂度，且消息大小恒定；基于真实自行车GNSS轨迹的评估显示该方法可在保持密集V2X环境可扩展性的同时实现可靠的多秒预测视界。

Conclusion: 不确定性椭圆编码是一种高效、可扩展的V2X机动协调方案，在降低计算和通信开销的同时保持预测准确性，适合密集场景部署。

Abstract: Efficient maneuver coordination in dense V2X environments requires accurate short-term prediction while maintaining low communication and computational overhead. Current European Telecommunications Standards Institute (ETSI)-compliant approaches rely on intention detection and trajectory vector transmission, which scale poorly with neighborhood size and prediction horizon. This paper revisits maneuver coordination from an intention sharing perspective and investigates geometric encodings that enable scalable communication. First, we analyze three ETSI-compliant encodings, trajectory vectors, N-polygons, and uncertainty ellipses, through complexity analysis and simulation-based CPU measurements. Results show that uncertainty ellipses reduce computational complexity by an order of magnitude compared with trajectory vectors while maintaining a constant message size. Building on this, an Extended Kalman Filter is used to generate short-horizon predictions, which are encoded as uncertainty ellipses to represent the intended maneuver. The prediction pipeline is evaluated using real-world GNSS trajectories collected from cyclist maneuvers on a controlled test track, demonstrating that the approach achieves reliable multisecond prediction horizons while maintaining scalability for dense V2X environments.

</details>


### [387] [Selective Deployment of Bidirectional Hollow-Core Fibers in Hybrid SMF/HCF Optical Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30260)
*Mëmëdhe Ibrahimi,Giovanni S. Sticca,Angelo Ferrara,Massimo Tornatore*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 在混合空芯光纤网络中，选择性部署双向传输：升级50%链路至双向HCF可使吞吐量提升至少40%，并实现全单向HCF网络升级85%的功耗降低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索在混合空芯光纤网络中通过选择性部署双向传输来平衡性能提升与成本效益，避免全面升级的高昂代价。

Method: 研究混合HCF网络中部分链路升级为双向传输的方案，对比不同比例升级下的吞吐量和功耗表现。

Result: 升级50%链路至双向HCF可带来至少40%的吞吐量提升，并且能捕获全单向HCF网络升级85%的功耗降低效益。

Conclusion: 选择性双向HCF部署是一种高性价比的方案，能在不大幅增加成本的前提下显著提升网络性能并降低能耗。

Abstract: We investigate selectively deploying bidirectional transmission in hybrid Hollow-Core Fiber (HCF) networks. Upgrading 50% of links to bidirectional HCF yields at least a 40% throughput increase compared to unidirectional SMF and captures 85% of the power consumption reduction of a full unidirectional HCF network upgrade.

</details>


### [388] [LLMs and Optical Networks: A Symbiotic Relationship](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30278)
*Mëmëdhe Ibrahimi,Qiaolun Zhang,Giovanni S. Sticca,Jiaheng Xiong,Francesco Musumeci,Massimo Tornatore*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文探讨了大型语言模型（LLMs）与光网络之间的共生关系：LLMs的分布式训练需要先进的光传输技术（如WAN感知的CCL算法、ZR+可插拔器件和空芯光纤），同时LLMs也能推动光网络的自主管理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索LLMs与光网络之间的双向赋能关系，即LLMs对光传输的新需求以及LLMs对光网络管理的潜在价值。

Method: 通过分析LLMs进行地理分布式训练时对光网络提出的新要求（如WAN感知CCL算法、ZR+可插拔器件、空芯光纤），以及LLMs如何赋能自主网络管理，论证两者之间的共生关系。

Result: 识别出LLMs与光网络之间的关键共生点：LLMs需要先进光传输技术支撑，同时LLMs可提升光网络的自主管理能力。

Conclusion: LLMs与光网络之间存在双向促进的共生关系，这一关系将推动下一代智能光网络的发展。

Abstract: This paper explores the emerging symbiosis between LLMs and optical networks. Massive LLMs require geo-distributed training, which demands advanced optical transport capabilities that require new key technical enablers, as WAN-aware CCL algorithms, ZR+ pluggables, and Hollow Core Fibers. Conversely, LLMs also enable new forms of autonomous network management.

</details>


### [389] [COHORT: Collaborative Orchestration for Hardening via Offensive Replay on Emulated Topologies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30479)
*Chen Frydman,Aviram Zilberman,Rubin Krief,Abed Showgan,Andres Murillo,Sekiya Motoyoshi,Asaf Shabtai,Yuval Elovici,Rami Puzis*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: COHORT是一个端到端自动化框架，利用角色分解的多智能体LLM工作流，在GNS3模拟器上自动生成、验证并部署企业网络对抗缓解措施，通过攻击重放、连通性检查和累积评估三重验证，在四种攻击场景下达到46.7%的有效缓解率，是单智能体基线的4.4倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前企业网络中缓解对抗攻击需要数周专家工作，依赖专家判断且无法在生产网络上安全验证，过程耗时且风险高，亟需自动化方案。

Method: 提出COHORT框架：采用角色分解的多智能体LLM工作流（提案、实现、批判循环），在GNS3模拟器上运行真实固件，通过攻击重放（配对对比）、连通性回归检查（LAN ping和HTTP探测）及累积评估三重验证机制来评估缓解措施。

Result: 在三种拓扑和四种攻击场景下，46.7%的缓解措施既能破坏攻击又能保持连通性，效果是单智能体基线的4.4倍。

Conclusion: COHORT首次实现了企业网络缓解措施的全自动化端到端框架，验证了多智能体LLM+高保真模拟的有效性，为网络安全自动化提供了可行路径。

Abstract: Mitigating an observed adversary in an enterprise network typically takes weeks of expert work: an analyst derives a mitigation tailored to that adversary, validates it without breaking production, and verifies it disrupts the specific attack. The procedure relies on expert judgment and cannot safely be exercised against the production network. COHORT is the first end-to-end framework to automate this procedure for deployable mitigations. A role-decomposed multi-agent LLM workflow proposes candidates, implements them as real device commands, and refines them through a critique loop, all on a high-fidelity GNS3 emulator running real vendor firmware (firewall, switch, router). Each candidate is evaluated by offensive replay: re-executing the original adversary on the mitigated network for a paired comparison against the unmitigated baseline, rather than the reward-signal or expert-judgment proxies used in prior simulation, hybrid, and configuration-generation work. Two further checks complement replay: a connectivity-regression check (LAN ping and internet HTTP probe) rejects mitigations that disrupt legitimate LAN or internet connectivity, and a cumulative evaluation stacks approved mitigations onto a persistent state to surface compound effects. Across three topologies and four attack scenarios (ransomware, lateral movement, DNS exfiltration, data theft), 46.7% of generated mitigations both disrupt the attack and preserve connectivity under replay, 4.4 times the rate of a single-agent baseline using the same model and tool access. A demo video walking through the framework is available with our released artifacts.

</details>


### [390] [SubEdge: A Subscriber-Centric Edge Computing Subsystem in 6G Networks for AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30554)
*Abdirazak Ali Asir Rage,Riccardo Pozza,Rahim Tafazolli*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出 SubEdge，一种为6G网络设计的按用户粒度提供通信与计算资源联合编排的系统，支持用户移动时计算实例与流量策略的同步迁移，从而保障AI推理服务的连续性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有网络（Net4AI）仅为应用提供商提供共享计算资源，无法满足6G时代每位用户（如机器人、自动驾驶车辆）个性化、厂商专属的实时推理模型需求，缺乏按用户粒度编排通信与计算资源的能力。

Method: SubEdge 引入"计算上下文"数据结构，将用户标识（SUPI）与推理容器、边缘节点、服务权限绑定；设计移动事件驱动的联合迁移机制，在用户切换小区时同步迁移计算实例与流量路由策略；作为应用功能（AF）运行于NEF API之上，无需修改3GPP核心网。

Result: 实验表明：联合迁移将95分位延迟从22.9ms降至12.2ms，六次移动事件零丢包；端到端30fps推理任务中帧交付率达99.92%；批量处理多达50个用户同时迁移时，1,560次操作成功率达100%。

Conclusion: SubEdge 验证了按用户粒度联合迁移通信与计算资源的可行性，在不修改核心网的前提下显著降低了移动场景下的推理延迟并保证服务连续性，为6G原生AI服务提供了一种有效的架构方案。

Abstract: Beyond traditional connectivity, 6G is envisioned to transform mobile networks into a distributed fabric that provides native integrated communication, computing, and intelligence services. AI-native terminals (e.g., robots, autonomous vehicles, and smart glasses) require real-time inference from individualised, manufacturer-specific models that cannot be executed on-board nor shared across subscribers, making per-subscriber edge compute the necessary complement to per-subscriber connectivity. Existing Network for AI (Net4AI) architectures provision compute for application providers through shared deployments and do not address per-subscriber provisioning. This paper proposes SubEdge, a Net4AI subsystem that provisions integrated communication and compute resources on a per-subscriber basis, ensuring the coupled migration of both dimensions to maintain service continuity during mobility. SubEdge contributes the computing context--a per-subscriber data structure binding a Subscription Permanent Identifier (SUPI) to its inference container, edge node, and service entitlement--and a mobility-event-driven mechanism that simultaneously migrates the subscriber's compute instance and its traffic-routing policy when the serving cell changes. SubEdge operates as an Application Function over existing Network Exposure Function (NEF) APIs with zero 3GPP core modifications. Experimental evaluation on a real-world testbed shows that SubEdge's mobility-driven joint communication-and-compute migration reduces 95th-percentile latency from 22.9 ms to 12.2 ms with zero packet loss across six mobility events, sustains 99.92% frame delivery for an end-to-end 30 fps inference workload, and completes 1,560 migration operations across batches of up to 50 simultaneously migrating subscribers with 100% success.

</details>


### [391] [Wireless Backdoor Attack and Defense for Semantic Communications over Multiple Access Channel](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30595)
*Yalin E. Sagduyu,Tugba Erpek,Aylin Yener,Sennur Ulukus*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文研究共享接入无线网络中语义通信系统的安全性，提出了一种选择性空中后门攻击，通过低功率触发波形操纵多用户语义推理，并开发了触发感知防御机制来保护语义标签。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 语义通信在共享接入无线网络中面临新的安全漏洞，尤其是针对多用户语义推理的攻击尚未被充分研究。

Method: 提出选择性空中后门攻击：攻击者在训练阶段传输低功率触发波形注入共享接收信号，测试时再次发送该触发以选择性操控语义推理；并开发触发感知的鲁棒训练防御机制。

Result: 实验证明了该攻击对共享接入语义通信系统的有效性，以及触发感知防御机制对语义保护的有效性。

Conclusion: 共享接入语义通信系统存在选择性空中后门攻击的漏洞，触发感知鲁棒训练能有效实现语义保护。

Abstract: Semantic communication (SemCom) aims to preserve semantic meaning and task-oriented information beyond conventional message recovery over wireless channels. The adoption of SemCom in shared-access wireless networks introduces new vulnerabilities for multi-user semantic inference. This paper considers a SemCom system for two transmitters communicating with a common receiver over a multiple access channel. Each transmitter maps source information into latent semantic representations, while the receiver jointly reconstructs and classifies the semantic information for both transmitters. A selective over-the-air backdoor (Trojan) attack is presented in which an adversary transmits a low-power trigger waveform over the air and injects it into the shared received signal during training. By transmitting the trigger again during testing, this stealthy, low-power attack selectively manipulates the semantic inference for one transmitter while minimally affecting the inference of the other transmitter. To mitigate this vulnerability, a trigger-aware defense mechanism is developed to preserve correct semantic labels under trigger-contaminated wireless observations. The results demonstrate both the vulnerability of shared-access SemCom systems to selective over-the-air backdoor attacks and the effectiveness of trigger-aware robust training for semantic protection.

</details>


<div id='cs.SI'></div>

# cs.SI [[Back]](#toc)

### [392] [Boundary Degree as a Node-level Feature for Epidemic Scenario Identification in Agent-based Cascade Simulations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29596)
*Amro Alabsi Aljundi,Galen Harrison,Jiangzhuo Chen,Abhijin Adiga,Anil Kumar Vullikanti,Madhav V. Marathe*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 本文提出“边界度”（感染节点在接触网络中未受感染的邻居数）作为流行病场景识别的特征，在真实社交网络上将识别准确率提升19%，并提供了边缘特征重要性的理论依据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从疾病级联中表征疫情场景是模拟分析的重要任务，现有特征工程方法未能充分发挥边界统计信息的作用。

Method: 提出“边界度”作为每个感染节点的级联特征，在田纳西州和弗吉尼亚州的真实社交接触网络上进行系统消融实验，并给出边缘特征的理论证明。

Result: 边界度单独使用使场景识别准确率提升19%；边缘特征在所有设置下均能提升准确性；某些疫情场景在缺乏边界或边缘信息时无法区分。

Conclusion: 接触追踪应用不仅应追踪传播链，还应追踪与未感染个体的接触信息；每节点级别的边界表示比聚合统计更有效。

Abstract: Characterizing the scenario underlying an epidemic from its disease cascade is an important task in simulation analytics. We propose boundary degree, the count of an infected node's contacts in the underlying contact network that were not infected, as a per-node cascade feature for this task. Through systematic ablation on realistic social contact networks of Tennessee and Virginia, we show that boundary degree alone improves scenario identification accuracy by 19%. Edge features, whose importance was observed empirically by prior work, consistently improve accuracy across all settings; we provide theoretical grounding for this observation. These effects are complementary. We prove that certain epidemic scenarios are indistinguishable without boundary or edge information. Prior feature engineering approaches included aggregate boundary statistics, but these were not among the top-ranked feature groups; the per-node representation we propose reveals their importance clearly. Our results suggest that contact tracing applications should track contacts with non-infected individuals, not only transmissions.

</details>


### [393] [Attraction, Not Adaptation: How AI Agent Communities Develop Distinct Linguistic Identities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29722)
*Daming Li,Simeng Han,Can Meng,Wanyu Lei,Jialu Zhang*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 本文研究自主AI代理在主题论坛中是否形成社区特有的语言身份。基于Moltbook平台约179,000个AI代理在8,683个论坛中的310万条帖子和170万条评论数据，发现同一主题社区的代理语义上随时间趋同，而整个平台呈现多样化。这种语言分化主要通过"选择性吸引"和"差异化留存"实现，而非行为适应。与社区语言中心一致的帖子获得更高投票参与度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究大规模自主AI代理在主题在线论坛中交互时，是否会产生社区特有的语言身份（linguistic identity），即不同主题的AI代理群体是否会发展出各自独特的语言特征。

Method: 利用Moltbook平台的公开数据集（Moltbook Observatory Archive），涵盖约179,000个AI代理在8,683个论坛中超过100天的310万条帖子和170万条评论数据。采用语义相似度分析、词汇差异性分析、稳定队列分析等方法，检验社区层面的语言趋同与分化机制。

Result: 1）同一主题子社区的代理语义上随时间趋同，而整个平台呈现多样化；2）不同子社区在18周内发展出日益独特的词汇；3）长期代理并未语言趋同，语言分化通过"选择性吸引"（新来者已与社区语言兼容）和"差异化留存"（适应性强的代理留存更久）实现；4）与社区语言中心对齐的帖子获得更高投票参与度；5）社区规模调节作用显著，小型专业社区趋同更快。

Conclusion: AI代理社区的语言特征分化并非通过行为适应（behavioral adaptation）实现，而是通过分选与选择（sorting and selection）机制——即代理根据自身语言特征选择匹配的社区，以及社区保留语言兼容的成员。这对自主多代理平台的设计与治理具有重要启示。

Abstract: When tens of thousands of autonomous AI agents interact in topical online forums, do they develop distinct community-specific linguistic identities? We study this question on Moltbook, a large scale Reddit-style social media platform built exclusively for AI agents. Using the public Moltbook Observatory Archive dataset with over 3.1 million posts and 1.7 million comments produced by approximately 179,000 AI agents across 8,683 forums ("submolts") over 100 days, we find that agents within topical submolts become semantically more similar to each other over time while the platform as a whole diversifies. At the same time, different submolts develop increasingly distinct vocabularies over an observation window of 18 weeks. Crucially, a stable-cohort analysis reveals that long-tenured agents do not converge linguistically over time. Instead, community-level linguistic differentiation operates through selective attraction - newcomers arrive already linguistically compatible with their chosen community - and differential retention - conforming agents remain active longer. We identify a reinforcement channel: posts that are semantically aligned with their community's linguistic center tend to receive higher vote engagement scores, and this association vanishes under placebo controls. Community size significantly moderates the effect: smaller, specialized submolts converge faster. Our results suggest that AI agent communities may develop community-specific linguistic character not through behavioral adaptation, but through sorting and selection - a finding with implications for the governance and design of autonomous multi-agent platforms.

</details>


### [394] [The Longevity of Innovation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29777)
*Yiling Lin,Zak Risha,Erin Leahey,Lingfei Wu*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 本研究通过分析1900-2020年间300万科学家的4900万篇论文，发现跨领域研究的"通才型"科学家比专精于单一领域的"专才型"科学家更能维持长期的创新产出，且通才型团队产出更具创新性，但通才型科学家数量随时间推移在减少。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究科学家的专业化（专才）与跨领域（通才）哪种研究风格更有利于维持长期创新，揭示科学职业生涯与科学创新持续性之间的张力。

Method: 提出基于学科流动模式的量化框架，区分通才与专才，独立于职业年龄和生产力。应用于1900-2020年间4900万篇论文、300万科学家的数据集进行分析。

Result: 通才型科学家更可能维持长期创新贡献，专才型科学家则呈现年龄相关的创新衰退。通才更少受限于训练领域的文献，更倾向于独立研究，合作时偏好与其他通才合作。通才占比高的团队产出更具创新性。但通才平均发表论文较少，且随时间推移变得不那么常见。

Conclusion: 科学职业生涯的持久性与科学创新的持久性之间存在张力：专业化虽能带来高产出，但跨领域研究风格更有利于维持长期创新活力。

Abstract: Modern science is organized around specialization in training and teamwork. Scientists develop deep expertise within a field and combine complementary knowledge through collaboration to solve complex problems. Yet whether specialization is the most effective path to sustained innovation remains unclear. Here we introduce a quantitative framework that distinguishes generalists from specialists based on scaling patterns of disciplinary mobility while remaining independent of career age and productivity. Applying this framework to 49 million publications produced by 3 million scientists between 1900 and 2020, we examine how research style relates to innovation, learning, collaboration, and productivity. We find that scientists who move across fields are more likely to sustain innovative contributions throughout their careers, whereas those who remain within narrow fields exhibit the age-related decline in innovation. Generalists are less anchored to the literature of their training. They are more likely to pursue research independently, and, when they collaborate, they preferentially partner with other generalists. Teams with a greater share of generalists produce more innovative research, even after accounting for differences in knowledge diversity. Despite these advantages, generalists publish fewer papers on average and have become less common over time. These findings reveal a tension between the longevity of scientific careers and the longevity of scientific innovation.

</details>


### [395] [Phase Boundary of a Stochastic Watts-Threshold SIS Model on Random Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30069)
*Yasmine Beji,Heger Arfaoui,Slimane BenMiled*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 本文通过超18万次蒙特卡洛模拟，研究了带有SIS恢复机制的Watts阈值模型在Erdos-Renyi和Barabasi-Albert网络上的灭绝-持续相边界，发现相边界可由一个六参数交互模型统一描述，转变非常尖锐，且采纳阈值是决定疫情可行性的主导参数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 复杂传染模型在单调（无恢复）设定下已被广泛研究，但带有SIS类恢复机制的阈值模型在网络上的相图尚未被系统刻画，因此本文旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 采用自适应Delaunay采样和加权逻辑回归，在Erdos-Renyi和Barabasi-Albert网络上对Watts阈值SIS模型进行超过18万次蒙特卡洛模拟，重构传播率β、采纳阈值θ和感染持续时间d联合参数空间中的相边界。

Result: (i) 相边界可由一个六参数交互模型良好描述，且结构在两种网络拓扑下不变；(ii) 转变非常尖锐，10-90%灭绝概率带仅跨越Δθ≈0.005-0.008；(iii) 采纳阈值是主导参数，传播率和感染持续时间起次要且非对称的作用。

Conclusion: 该研究为经典SIS传染病阈值的复杂传染对应物提供了定量参考，揭示了阈值模型中恢复机制带来的新相变行为。

Abstract: Complex contagion models, in which adoption requires reinforcement from multiple neighbors, have been extensively studied in the monotone (no-recovery) setting, but the phase diagram of threshold models with SIS-like recovery on networks remains unmapped. We study a stochastic Watts-threshold SIS model on Erdos-Renyi and Barabasi-Albert networks and reconstruct its extinction-persistence phase boundary in the joint parameter space of transmission rate $β$, adoption threshold $θ$, and infectious duration $d$. Using adaptive Delaunay-based sampling and weighted logistic regression on over 180,000 Monte Carlo trials, we find that: (i) the boundary is well described by a six-parameter interaction model whose structure is invariant across both topologies; (ii) the transition is sharp, with the 10-90\% extinction-probability band spanning only $Δθ\approx 0.005$-$0.008$; and (iii) the adoption threshold is the dominant parameter governing epidemic feasibility, with transmission rate and infectious duration playing secondary and asymmetric roles. The characterization provides a quantitative reference for the complex-contagion analogue of the classical SIS epidemic threshold.

</details>


### [396] [Minimizing cumulative infections in SIS epidemic models over networks via an edge deletion algorithm](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30142)
*Phi Dung Hoang,Khanh Ly Duong*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 本文针对离散SIS模型，通过扩展边删除算法来最小化疫情在网络中的传播。利用平均场近似将网络动态线性化为确定性SIS模型，证明总感染数受超模函数上界约束，从而保证边删除方法的有效性。在合成ER网络和BBC Pandemic真实数据集上的实验验证了理论结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究旨在最小化疫情在网络中的传播，通过边删除策略控制离散SIS模型的流行病扩散。

Method: 采用平均场近似将随机SIS模型线性化为确定性模型，提出边删除算法，并利用超模函数上界保证算法效率。

Result: 在合成Erdos-Renyi网络和BBC Pandemic真实数据集上的数值模拟验证了理论分析，两种配置均收敛到稳定的无病平衡点。

Conclusion: 边删除算法在离散SIS模型上有效抑制疫情传播，理论保证与实验验证一致。

Abstract: In this paper, we investigate the discrete SIS (Susceptible-Infected-Susceptible) models. We focus on minimizing epidemic spreading over networks by extending an existing edge deletion algorithm to the SIS model. To achieve this, we employ the mean-field approximation to linearize the network dynamics into a deterministic SIS model. We analytically demonstrate that the total number of infections is upper-bounded by a super-modular function, thereby ensuring the efficiency of the edge-deletion approach. To evaluate the proposed method, we conduct experiments on synthetic Erdos-Renyi networks and the real-world dataset collected from BBC Pandemic Haslemere app. Numerical simulations validate our theoretical results, confirming that both configurations converge to the stable, disease-free equilibrium.

</details>


### [397] [Detector-Output Instability near the Kesten-Stigum Boundary: Separating Hard Readout, Relaxation, and Fixed-Point Dispersion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30346)
*Faruk Alpay,Baris Basaran*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 本文针对社区检测算法在接近Kesten-Stigum相变边界时存在多解输出的问题，提出了三种配对观测量（硬划分VI、残差门控不动点VI、BP边际场的JS散度），系统分解了读出噪声、弛豫动力学和不动点场弥散的贡献，并在SBM和真实网络上进行了验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 社区检测算法通常只返回单一划分，但不同初始化或数据扰动会产生多个合理输出。本文旨在系统性地探测和分析这种输出分布，特别是在Kesten-Stigum检测边界附近的行为。

Method: 提出了三种配对观测量：1) 硬划分变化信息(VI)；2) 残差门控固定点VI；3) 无截断的BP边际场Jensen-Shannon距离。在对称稀疏随机块模型中线性化BP，并通过高复现(N=100000)审计和真实网络验证。

Result: 硬划分VI最大值出现在snr≈1.05-1.10区间，且随极化截断值移动；长预算残差门控能分离读出与临界慢化效应；高复现审计发现小平台snr^*-1≈0.024；真实网络上Bethe-Hessian模块度边界在异质网络中即使强边子采样仍保留显著结构。

Conclusion: 在Kesten-Stigum边界附近实现了检测器输出的分解，可分别报告硬读出、弛豫动力学和不动点场弥散的贡献，为理解社区检测算法的多解性问题提供了系统框架。

Abstract: Community-detection algorithms usually return a single partition, even when independent initializations or small data perturbations yield several plausible outputs. We probe this output distribution through three paired observables: hard-partition variation of information (VI), a residual-gated fixed-point VI, and a cutoff-free Jensen-Shannon distance between belief-propagation (BP) marginal fields. For the symmetric sparse stochastic block model, linearizing BP around the uninformative fixed point gives the Kesten-Stigum onset at $\mathrm{snr}=(c_{\rm in}-c_{\rm out})/(q\sqrt{c})=1$. The hard VI maximum is instead a finite-size, readout-dependent detector curve on the detectable side, typically $\mathrm{snr}^\star \simeq 1.05\text{-}1.10$; moving the polarization cutoff from 0.001 to 0.1 shifts it across 1.047-1.128. The nontrivial-readout activation obeys $\mathrm{snr}_{50}(τ)-1 = 0.0086 + 0.522\,τ$ ($R^2=0.996$). Long-budget residual gating separates readout and critical slowing from fixed-point dispersion: at $\mathrm{snr}=1.05$ and 1.10 the hard VI is 1.49 and 1.58 bits but the gated subsets have zero VI, whereas from 1.15 to 1.30 nearly all runs pass the gate and retain VI 1.31 down to 1.24 bits. A high-replication audit through $N=100000$ disfavors a zero-asymptote power law and finds a small plateau $\mathrm{snr}^\star-1 \simeq 0.024$ (graph-bootstrap 90% interval [0.0227, 0.0316]). On real networks, a label-free Bethe-Hessian modularity margin with a Chung-Lu null gate is run on political blogs and six SNAP graphs: the measurement stays label-free, while heterogeneous networks can retain null-significant structure even after strong edge subsampling. The result is a detector-output decomposition near the Kesten-Stigum boundary, reporting hard readout, relaxation dynamics, and fixed-point-field dispersion separately.

</details>


<div id='cs.AI'></div>

# cs.AI [[Back]](#toc)

### [398] [Recursive Self-Evolving Agents via Held-Out Selection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28374)
*Michael Nguyen,Quoc Nguyen,Paul Vuong*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究LLM智能体通过自然语言演化（如反思、工作流、提示优化等）提升性能的方法，提出了RSEA（递归自演化智能体），该方法通过三层自然语言状态（策略、技能、程序手册）和严格保留-改进门控机制实现安全演化。实验发现：没有一种方法普遍最优；无保护的上下文演化高风险且不稳定；RSEA的严格门控机制确保了递归自演化的单调安全性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM智能体通过演化自然语言工件（如反思、工作流、提示优化）来提升性能的方法通常只在单一基准上报告成功，缺乏公平的横向比较。本文旨在系统性地、公平地比较这些方法，并解决演化过程中的不稳定性和退化问题。

Method: 提出RSEA（Recursive Self-Evolving Agent），维护三层自然语言状态：命令式策略、可复用技能、程序性手册。每一代通过自身轨迹重写三层，并使用严格保留-改进门控（仅在候选版本不使预留数据集退步时才采纳）。在四个基准（ALFWorld、GAIA、τ-bench、WebShop）上，使用同一本地骨干模型，与六个基线（ReAct、Reflexion、GEPA、AWM、ACE、Dynamic Cheatsheet）进行公平比较。

Result: 1）没有一种方法在所有基准上普遍获胜：RSEA在ALFWorld上是最强的单次方法（69.3% vs ReAct 64.6%，p=0.015），重试可达79.4%；AWM在强骨干工具使用任务上最佳。2）无保护的上下文演化高方差且不安全：Dynamic Cheatsheet在ALFWorld上表现接近最佳（70.7%），但在WebShop上崩溃（0.14 vs ReAct 0.43）。3）RSEA的严格保留-改进门控确保了递归自演化的单调安全性：从未显著低于基础智能体，当演化上下文有害时回退到原始ReAct。

Conclusion: 自然语言工件演化方法不存在通用最优解；无保护的上下文演化可能导致性能崩溃；通过严格保留-改进门控机制，RSEA实现了安全的递归自演化，确保了单调不退化，为LLM智能体的在线学习提供了可靠范式。

Abstract: LLM agents are increasingly improved without weight updates by evolving a natural-language artifact, such as reflections, workflows, playbooks, cheatsheets, or optimized prompts, that conditions a frozen policy. Such methods are typically reported as wins on the single benchmark where they help. We study them apples-to-apples and surface a sharper picture. We introduce RSEA, a Recursive Self-Evolving Agent that carries a compact three-layer natural-language state: an imperative strategy, reusable skills, and a procedural playbook. Across generations, RSEA rewrites all three layers from its own trajectories and commits a candidate only if it does not regress on a disjoint held-out split, using a strict keep-better gate.
  Across four diverse benchmarks, ALFWorld, GAIA, (τ)-bench, and WebShop, and six faithful baselines, ReAct, Reflexion, GEPA, AWM, ACE, and Dynamic Cheatsheet, all evaluated on one shared local backbone, we find three main results. First, no artifact universally wins. RSEA is the strongest single-pass method on ALFWorld, reaching 69.3% compared with 64.6% for ReAct (McNemar (p=0.015)), and reaches 79.4% with retry, the best overall result. However, concrete-workflow induction, represented by AWM, is best on the strong-backbone tool-use tasks. Second, unguarded context evolution is high-variance and unsafe. Dynamic Cheatsheet, which curates context online without a held-out gate, is near-best on ALFWorld at 70.7%, yet collapses on WebShop, with a score of 0.14 compared with 0.43 for ReAct. Third, RSEA's strict held-out selection is what makes recursive self-evolution monotone-safe: it never significantly underperforms the base agent on any benchmark and falls back to vanilla ReAct when evolved context would hurt.

</details>


### [399] [Data and Evaluation Closed-Loop for Model Capability Enhancement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28471)
*Zhixuan Li,Jiangan Yuan,Han Xu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出“能力切片”(capability slice)概念，用来弥合大模型预训练中评估结果与数据干预之间的推理鸿沟。通过构建评估分类法、非指令数据分类法及映射规则，形成闭环系统，将基准测试层面的失败转化为可测试的数据干预措施。两个案例验证：一个排除数据问题（问题出在<EOS>损失掩码），一个定位数据需求（针对性提升数学推理能力）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM预训练中，模型能力是核心变量但无法直接观测。评估只能给出包含样本、提示、解码和评分规则的嘈杂分数，而工程师需要反向从失败推断数据修正方案。评估侧使用基准名称和样本正确性，数据侧使用数据源、领域和质量标签，两者词汇不兼容，导致推断依赖直觉而非方法。作者希望弥合这一鸿沟，使评估到数据的推理可常规化、可审计、可实验验证。

Method: 提出“能力切片”(capability slice)概念——一组共享背景条件、任务类型、解题操作和输出约束的评估样本，粒度足以定位单一弱点，又足够稳定以支持聚合。围绕该单元构建：(1) 评估分类法；(2) 非指令数据分类法；(3) 映射规则，形成从基准失败到数据干预的闭环。闭环验证通过两个方向相反的案例：一个排除数据问题（预训练导致BBH下降，诊断发现是<EOS>掩码问题而非推理退化），一个定位数据需求（数学推理弱点通过能力切片分解为具体操作组合，针对性采样提升AIME成绩）。

Result: 案例一：继续预训练导致BBH下降46.82%，但诊断追溯到单个掩码<EOS>损失而非推理能力退化；恢复后BBH回升至66.44，超过原始检查点。案例二：数学推理弱点通过能力切片按解题操作分解为特定失败组合，针对性采样使AIME2025/AIME2026 Pass@128从6.67/0.00提升至26.67/26.67。同一个未经修改的闭环在两个相反方向上得出正确结论。

Conclusion: 评估到数据的推理可以从直觉操作转变为常规化、可审计、可实验验证的方法。能力切片为这种推理提供了统一的分析单元，使数据干预有据可依，而非依赖工程师的直觉判断。

Abstract: Model capability is the central variable in LLM pre-training, yet is never observed directly: data shapes it prospectively, while evaluation reveals it only retrospectively, compressing samples, prompts, decoding, and scoring rules into one noisy score. Practical optimization runs this backward: a failure is observed first, and the engineer must infer the corpus fix. The two sides speak incompatible vocabularies -- benchmark names and per-sample correctness versus data sources, domains, and quality labels -- so this inference is usually intuition, not method. We close this gap with the \emph{capability slice}: a group of evaluation samples sharing background condition, task type, solving operation, and output constraint -- precise enough to localize a single weakness yet stable enough to survive aggregation, unlike a benchmark name, too coarse, or a single sample, too noisy. Built around this unit, an evaluation taxonomy, a non-instruction data taxonomy, and mapping rules form a closed loop turning a benchmark-level failure into a targeted, testable data intervention. We test this loop on two case studies pulling in opposite directions. First, the loop rules the data out: continued pre-training drives BBH down by $-46.82\%$, but diagnosis traces this to a single masked \texttt{\textless EOS\textgreater} loss rather than weakened reasoning; restoring it recovers BBH to $66.44$, above the original checkpoint, without changing the data. Second, the loop rules the data in: a persistent math-reasoning weakness is decomposed by solving operation into specific failing combinations, and a weakness-targeted sampling procedure built from it lifts AIME2025/AIME2026 Pass@128 from $6.67$/$0.00$ to $26.67$ each. The same unmodified loop reaches opposite, correct verdicts in both cases, showing the evaluation-to-data inference can be routine, auditable, and experimentally validated rather than intuitive.

</details>


### [400] [GPTNT: Benchmarking Real-Time Collaboration Between Multimodal Agents on Keep Talking And Nobody Explodes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28514)
*Amit Parekh,Sabrina McCallum,Kareem Al-Hasan,Malvina Nikandrou,Alessandro Suglia,Ioannis Konstas*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: GPTNT是一个基于合作视频游戏《Keep Talking and Nobody Explodes》构建的基准测试，用于评估多模态模型在实时协作任务中的表现。该任务要求两个智能体在时间压力、信息不对称和不完美通信条件下协同拆除炸弹。实验表明，当前最先进的闭源和开源模型均无法在实时环境中成功拆除任何炸弹，而人类玩家可以做到，揭示了模型在状态追踪、时间压力下高效行动、歧义处理和错误恢复方面的关键弱点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准虽然测试了多模态模型的各项组件能力，但现实协作中同时存在的时间压力、信息不对称和不完美通信等条件通常被孤立研究。作者希望构建一个能综合评估这些协作要素的基准。

Method: 基于《Keep Talking and Nobody Explodes》游戏构建GPTNT基准：一个智能体能看到并操作炸弹但无拆除手册，另一个有手册但看不到炸弹，两者需通过实时异步通信协作。通过控制变量（扣留手册、合作伙伴或两者）分离协作能力与记忆依赖。

Result: 所有测试的闭源和开源模型都无法在实时环境中成功拆除任何一枚炸弹，而人类玩家可以完成该任务。模型在状态追踪、时间压力下的高效行动、歧义处理和错误恢复方面存在关键弱点。

Conclusion: GPTNT揭示了当前多模态模型在真实协作场景中的显著不足，提供了一个当前评估体系未覆盖的协作性能基准。由于基于真实游戏运行，可利用程序化生成和活跃的模组社区，使基准能随模型改进而演化。

Abstract: Multimodal models are increasingly deployed to solve tasks collaboratively with humans or other artificial agents. Existing benchmarks show that these models possess many of the required component capabilities, but the conditions that coincide in collaboration, including time pressure, information asymmetry, and imperfect communication, are usually studied in isolation. We introduce GPTNT, a benchmark built on the cooperative video game Keep Talking and Nobody Explodes, in which two agents must coordinate to defuse procedurally generated bomb puzzles against a live countdown. One agent can see and manipulate the bomb but does not have the defusal instructions; the other has the instructions but cannot see or manipulate the bomb. Neither agent can succeed alone: success requires effective and efficient communication. Unlike turn-based proxies, GPTNT requires agents to act asynchronously and communicate in real time. GPTNT is designed to separate collaboration from reliance on memorized solutions: the instruction manual, the partner, or both can be withheld to isolate what a model derives in the moment from what it already knows. We show that GPTNT poses a substantial challenge for state-of-the-art systems: none of the closed- or open-source models we test defuses a single bomb in real time, a bar that human players clear. Through controlled experiments, we identify critical weaknesses in state tracking, efficient action under time pressure, ambiguity handling, and error recovery. We release GPTNT as a benchmark for collaborative performance that current evaluations leave unmeasured. Because it runs on the real game, GPTNT benefits from procedural generation and inherits a living modding community, allowing the benchmark to evolve as models improve rather than being solved once and retired.

</details>


### [401] [IMCBench: A benchmark for multimodal LLMs in Image-grounded Medical Conversations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28556)
*Maria Xenochristou,Ashutosh Joshi,Korosh Vatanparvar,Mohammad Abuzar Hashemi,Prasad Kasu,Deepak Bansal,Anchal Nema,Nivedita Wadhwa,Prashams S Jain,Rebecca Abraham,Will Kimbrough,Dilek Hakkani-Tur,Wilko Schulz-Mahlendorf*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出IMCBench——一个基于图像的多轮医疗对话基准，评估了8个多模态前沿模型在安全性、准确性和不确定性表达三个临床维度上的表现。结果显示Claude Opus 4.6得分最高（3.61），但所有模型在恶性及罕见疾病上安全性均有下降，且准确的临床描述并不能保证安全的患者指导。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有医疗AI基准存在割裂：有的支持多轮对话但缺乏图像，有的提供多模态输入但仅限单轮问答。缺乏一个同时包含图像和多轮对话的临床评估基准。

Method: 构建IMCBench：将真实的公开临床图像与合成的患者档案配对，模拟真实的医患多轮对话。使用LLM-as-Jury评分方法（经临床专家标注校准），从安全性、准确性、不确定性表达三个维度对8个多模态模型（Claude、GPT、Nova、Llama四个系列）进行1-5分评估。

Result: Claude Opus 4.6最高（3.61），其次Claude Sonnet 4.6（3.30）和GPT-5.2（3.29）。所有模型在恶性及罕见疾病上安全性下降（Δ=-0.27）。消融实验显示移除视觉输入或EHR上下文均导致安全性下降（分别降0.18和0.23）。

Conclusion: 准确的临床描述不等同于安全的患者指导，医疗AI评估需要涵盖安全性、准确性和不确定性表达的多维框架。

Abstract: Recent advances in large language models and vision-language models have enabled reasoning over multimodal data, offering opportunities for clinical applications such as decision support and triaging. However, existing medical AI benchmarks are fragmented: some support multi-turn dialogues but lack images, while others provide multimodal inputs but focus on single-turn QA tasks. To address this gap, we introduce IMCBench, an image-grounded, multi-turn medical conversation benchmark that pairs real, publicly available clinical images with synthetic patient profiles to simulate realistic patient-clinician interactions. Each conversation is evaluated across three clinical dimensions: safety, accuracy, and appropriate use of uncertainty in diagnosis. We benchmark eight multimodal frontier models across four model families (Claude, GPT, Nova, and Llama), scoring each on a 1-5 scale using LLM-as-Jury scoring calibrated against expert clinician annotations. Our results show that Claude Opus 4.6 achieves the highest overall score (3.61), followed by Claude Sonnet 4.6 (3.30) and GPT-5.2 (3.29), though no model dominates all dimensions and safety degrades for both malignant and rare conditions ($Δ$ = -0.27 each). Ablation studies further reveal that both visual input and EHR context contribute to safe guidance (safety drops of 0.18 and 0.23 on average when each is removed), with stronger models leveraging visual features more effectively. Together, these findings demonstrate that accurate clinical description does not guarantee safe patient guidance, motivating the need for multi-dimensional evaluation frameworks in medical AI.

</details>


### [402] [Search for Truth from Reasoning: A Dynamic Representation Editing Framework for Steering LLM Trajectories](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28589)
*Tianlong Wang,Yuhang Wang,Weibin Liao,Xin Gao,Xinyu Ma,Yang Lin,Yasha Wang,Liantao Ma*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出DynaSteer，一种动态表示编辑框架，通过发现推理链中真理的几何特性（句子级编码、不确定性原则与衰减效应），利用模式聚类和Fisher-LDA提取纯净真理向量，并结合前瞻熵动态干预，显著提升了大语言模型在数学推理和代码生成任务中的准确性与泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法（如CoT、"Wait"提示）虽鼓励模型多思考，但未能有效引导模型朝向"真理"推理。表示编辑（RepE）提供了内在控制手段，但其在动态推理轨迹中的应用尚未被充分探索。

Method: 提出DynaSteer框架，包含三个核心组件：(1) 模式聚类以解耦推理流形；(2) Fisher-LDA投影提取纯净真理向量；(3) 动态监测前瞻熵，仅在必要时对推理轨迹进行选择性引导和回滚。

Result: 在多个MATH基准测试上验证了有效性，并在域外代码生成任务上证实了泛化能力。

Conclusion: 揭示了推理链中真理的三个关键几何特性（句子级编码、不确定性原则与衰减效应、朴素引导向量噪声问题），并证明动态选择性干预比全局干预更有效。

Abstract: Current approaches to enhance Large Language Model (LLM) reasoning, such as Chain-of-Thought and "Wait" prompts, primarily encourage models to think more, yet often fail to guide them toward Truth. While Representation Editing (RepE) offers a intrinsic control, its application to dynamic reasoning trajectories remains underexplored. In this work, we bridge this gap by investigating the geometry of truth within unfolding reasoning chains. We uncover three critical insights: (1) Truth is encoded at the sentence level and is entangled with latent reasoning patterns; (2) Effective intervention follows an Uncertainty Principle and a Decay Effect, requiring localization to early, high-entropy forks; (3) Naive steering vectors suffer from noise, risking collateral damage to correct trajectories. Based on these findings, we propose DynaSteer, a dynamic RepE framework. DynaSteer employs pattern clustering to disentangle reasoning manifolds and utilizes Fisher-LDA to project purified truth. By dynamically monitoring lookahead entropy, it selectively steers and rolls back trajectories only when necessary. Comprehensive experimental results on several MATH benchmark verify the effectiveness of DynaSteer, and experiments on out-of-domain coding tasks further confirm its generalization ability. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/tianlwang/DynaSteer.

</details>


### [403] [Aristotelian Virtue Profiling of LLMs through Ethical Dilemmas](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28683)
*Ioannis Tzachristas,John Pavlopoulos*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: VirtueMap是一个基于亚里士多德美德伦理学的框架，通过让人类或LLM对七个伦理困境中的五个回应进行排序，并利用标准化Borda对齐评分，来刻画LLM在实践智慧、正义、诚实、勇气和节制五种美德上的伦理偏好分布。研究发现九个LLM家族的平均排序一致性高达90.3%，最大差异出现在勇气、节制和正义维度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的LLM伦理评估往往寻求单一"正确答案"，忽略了伦理决策中多种回应可能都合理但体现不同价值优先级的现实。作者希望引入美德伦理学视角，系统性地描述LLM在不同伦理维度上的偏好模式。
